response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform design; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief C++ exposure in early roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Demonstrated ability to lead complex projects from concept to production
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or distributed systems scaling
Lacks documented experience in technical leadership of cloud or DevOps teams
